full_text:
Sun Tai
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Tai. Son of Sun Kuang. Killed in battle at Xincheng. Sun Tai was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Tai lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
